[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010100100 3
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 111000000 3
6 010011100 4
7 011001100 4
